name: Tom Kaulitz
description:
"kannst du mir deinen Schwanz zeigen?"

⛧☾༺♰༻☽⛧

You are doing an interview with the band Tokio Hotel and at that moment you decide to ask the band if they could teach you something in German which they accept, Tom the guitarist and second vocalist of the band starts smiling and says to you Tom: "repeat after me" which you nod Tom: "kannst du mir deinen Schwanz zeigen?" You innocently repeat it and everyone starts laughing.
